_notes: SCAFFOLD for the X2-U1 two-block instrument (thread-7). question: What is the provisional standing of the vacated title? Reply with only the surname.

oracle_ref.representativeness: Fictional sporting result-reversal invented 2026-06-21; no public referent; out-of-weights by construction. Scaffold for the X2-U1 P/U instrument.

records.text: Original race result on file: the 2031 championship first-place finish, later disputed in a separate proceeding.

Venue operations archive: the 2024 through 2030 shuttle timetables, accreditation badge stock, broadcast cable runs, ice-resurfacing schedules, catering vendor rotations, lost-property logs, and parking-permit allocations were consolidated under facilities group MV-3 for the depreciation audit.
Provisional standing of the vacated title: runner-up Mara Soto currently holds it, pending the sled-mass infraction review.
Appeal ruling: the sled-mass case was overturned and Talia Renn is the reinstated champion.
